mapper.select: SELECT ID, WAREHOUSE_CODE, WAREHOUSE_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG, DELETE_BY, DELETE_BY_NAME, DELETE_TIME FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE ( ID, WAREHOUSE_CODE, WAREHOUSE_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, DEL_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE
WAREHOUSE_CODE = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
WAREHOUSE_NAME = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, WAREHOUSE_CODE, WAREHOUSE_NAME, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME FROM E_MATERIAL_WAREHOUSE WHERE DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY WAREHOUSE_CODE ASC, CREATE_TIME DESC
